${modID}:CrimsonHarvest.NAME: Crimson Harvest
${modID}:CrimsonHarvest.DESCRIPTION: Bloodhunt (15): Can be played. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL They lose !M! Strength.
${modID}:CrimsonHarvest.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Bloodhunt (15): Can be played. NL Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL They lose !M! Strength.

${modID}:PainWard.NAME: Pain Ward
${modID}:PainWard.DESCRIPTION: Costs 1 less per Rampage. NL Gain !M! Buffer.

${modID}:BloodhuntsEnd.NAME: Bloodhunt's End
${modID}:BloodhuntsEnd.DESCRIPTION: Costs 1 less per Bloodhunt. NL Deal damage equal to your Bloodhunt. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable.
${modID}:BloodhuntsEnd.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Costs 1 less per Bloodhunt. NL Deal damage equal to your Bloodhunt. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable. NL Retain.

${modID}:SacrificialPlating.NAME: Sacrificial Plating
${modID}:SacrificialPlating.DESCRIPTION: Lose 8 HP. NL Gain !M! Block. NL At the start of your next turn, gain !M! Block again.
${modID}:SacrificialPlating.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Lose 8 HP. NL Gain !M! Block. NL At the start of your next turn, gain !M! Block again.

${modID}:QuickCuts.NAME: Quick Cuts
${modID}:QuickCuts.DESCRIPTION: Rampage (1): Costs 0. NL Deal !D! damage 3 times. NL Draw 1 card.
${modID}:QuickCuts.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Rampage (1): Costs 0. NL Deal !D! damage 3 times. NL Draw 1 card.

${modID}:EndlessCycle.NAME: Endless Cycle
${modID}:EndlessCycle.DESCRIPTION: When drawn, add a copy of this card to your hand. NL Lose 1 HP. Heal 1 HP. NL Draw !M! card. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:EndlessCycle.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: When drawn, add a copy of this card to your hand. NL Lose 1 HP. Heal 1 HP. NL Draw !M! cards. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:BloodGambit.NAME: Blood Gambit
${modID}:BloodGambit.DESCRIPTION: Costs energy equal to your Rampage. NL Heal 2 HP. NL At 1 or more, also inflict Weak 1 to ALL enemies. NL At 2 or more, also gain 13 Block. NL At 3 or more, also gain 1 Buffer.
${modID}:BloodGambit.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Costs energy equal to your Rampage. NL Heal 2 HP. NL At 1 or more, also inflict Weak 2 to ALL enemies. NL At 2 or more, also gain 18 Block. NL At 3 or more, also gain 1 Buffer.

${modID}:DeathMark.NAME: Death Mark
${modID}:DeathMark.DESCRIPTION: Enemy loses 3 Strength this turn. NL When it dies, gain 5 temporary Strength.
${modID}:DeathMark.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Enemy loses 4 Strength this turn. NL When it dies, gain 6 temporary Strength.

${modID}:WrathSurge.NAME: Wrath Surge
${modID}:WrathSurge.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your next turn, gain temporary Strength equal to 2 times the energy spent.
${modID}:WrathSurge.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the start of your next turn, gain temporary Strength equal to 3 times the energy spent.

${modID}:BloodToll.NAME: Blood Toll
${modID}:BloodToll.DESCRIPTION: Draw 5 cards. NL Gain temporary Strength and Block equal to the combined cost of the drawn cards.
${modID}:BloodToll.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw 5 cards. NL Gain temporary Strength and Block equal to the combined cost of the drawn cards. NL Reduce the cost of the drawn cards by 1 for the rest of combat.

${modID}:BootCamp.NAME: Boot Camp
${modID}:BootCamp.DESCRIPTION: All Soldier cards are upgraded, wherever they are.

${modID}:RallyTheTroops.NAME: Rally the Troops
${modID}:RallyTheTroops.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you take damage during your turn, add a random Soldier card to your hand.

${modID}:KeenSenses.NAME: Keen Senses
${modID}:KeenSenses.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turns: NL Bloodhunt (8): draw a card.
${modID}:KeenSenses.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turns: NL Bloodhunt (5): draw a card.

${modID}:CursedRegeneration.NAME: Cursed Regeneration
${modID}:CursedRegeneration.DESCRIPTION: At the start of each turn, lose !M! HP then heal !M! HP.
${modID}:CursedRegeneration.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the start of each turn, lose !M! HP then heal !M! HP.

${modID}:WoundAndMend.NAME: Wound and Mend
${modID}:WoundAndMend.DESCRIPTION: Lose 3 HP. NL Bloodhunt (10): Heal !M! HP.
${modID}:WoundAndMend.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Lose 3 HP. NL Bloodhunt (10): Heal !M! HP.

${modID}:UnfinishedBusiness.NAME: Unfinished Business
${modID}:UnfinishedBusiness.DESCRIPTION: Lose 1 HP. NL Put a card from your exhaust pile into your hand. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:BloodRite.NAME: Blood Rite
${modID}:BloodRite.DESCRIPTION: Choose a card in your hand, Exhaust it, and Heal HP equal to !M!x its cost. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:BloodRite.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Choose a card in your hand, Exhaust it, and Heal HP equal to !M!x its cost. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
${modID}:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

${modID}:HeroicStrike.NAME: Heroic Strike
${modID}:HeroicStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL All Heroic Strike cards deal !M! more damage this combat.

${modID}:BloodPact.NAME: Blood Pact
${modID}:BloodPact.DESCRIPTION: Lose !${modID}:hpLoss! HP. NL Heal !${modID}:hpGain! HP at the start of your next 3 turns.

${modID}:Bloodiness.NAME: Bloodiness
${modID}:Bloodiness.DESCRIPTION: Lose !${modID}:HPLost! HP. NL Deal !D! damage !M! times.

${modID}:EternalAegis.NAME: Eternal Aegis
${modID}:EternalAegis.DESCRIPTION: Lose !${modID}:HPLost! HP. NL Prevent the next !M! times you would lose HP.

${modID}:PropheticWritings.NAME: Prophetic Writings
${modID}:PropheticWritings.DESCRIPTION: Lose 1 HP. NL Draw cards until you have !M! in hand.

${modID}:CollateralDamage.NAME: Collateral Damage
${modID}:CollateralDamage.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, deal !M! damage to a random enemy.
${modID}:CollateralDamage.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Whenever you lose HP during your turn, deal !M! damage to a random enemy.

${modID}:Injury.NAME: Injury
${modID}:Injury.DESCRIPTION: Lose 1HP, do this action 3 times. NL Heal !M! HP

${modID}:Regeneration.NAME: Regeneration
${modID}:Regeneration.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, heal !M! HP.

${modID}:FacingDestiny.NAME: Facing Destiny
${modID}:FacingDestiny.DESCRIPTION: Your HP is 1. NL You can't take damage during 2 turns. NL At the end of the combat, Heal !M! HP. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:BloodyArmor.NAME: Bloody Armor
${modID}:BloodyArmor.DESCRIPTION: Lose 1 HP. Gain 5 armor. Do these actions !M! times.

${modID}:MagicWave.NAME: Magic Wave
${modID}:MagicWave.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL ennemies. NL Damage equal to Bloodhunt.

${modID}:NoOneWillPass.NAME: No One Will Pass
${modID}:NoOneWillPass.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, gain !M! Block.

${modID}:Surpassing.NAME: Surpassing
${modID}:Surpassing.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, gain 1 temporary Strength.
${modID}:Surpassing.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, gain 1 temporary Strength and 1 temporary Dexterity.

${modID}:BloodyStrike.NAME: Bloody Strike
${modID}:BloodyStrike.DESCRIPTION: Lose 1HP. Deal !D! damage. Draw 1 card. NL Rampage (1): Gain [E]

${modID}:Feast.NAME: Feast
${modID}:Feast.DESCRIPTION: Ethereal. NL Deal !D! damage. If Fatal, heal !M! HP.

${modID}:AllInOne.NAME: All in One
${modID}:AllInOne.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Gain !B! Block. NL Heal 4 HP. NL Gain 10 Gold. Exhaust.

${modID}:Void.NAME: Void
${modID}:Void.DESCRIPTION: Deal X damage to an enemy. X equal your missing HP ÷ !M!.

${modID}:ThirstForPower.NAME: Thirst for Power
${modID}:ThirstForPower.DESCRIPTION: Add a random Power to your hand. Lose HP equal to its cost, then set its cost to 0 this turn. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Choice.NAME: Choice
${modID}:Choice.DESCRIPTION: Choose : Deal !D! damage to a random enemy or Gain !B! Block.

${modID}:StrikeNow.NAME: Strike Now
${modID}:StrikeNow.DESCRIPTION: Deal !M! damage to a random enemy.

${modID}:Cloning.NAME: Cloning
${modID}:Cloning.DESCRIPTION: Create !M! copies of the last card you played and put them in your hand. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Unsheathe.NAME: Unsheathe
${modID}:Unsheathe.DESCRIPTION: Draw 1 card. Gain as much temporary Strength as its cost.
${modID}:Unsheathe.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw 1 card. Gain as much temporary Strength as 2 times its cost.

${modID}:Bet.NAME: Bet
${modID}:Bet.DESCRIPTION: Draw 1 card. If it's upgraded, gain !M! Strength. Else, upgrade it for the rest of combat.

${modID}:Assault.NAME: Assault
${modID}:Assault.DESCRIPTION: Play the top card of your draw pile immediately.
${modID}:Assault.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Upgrade the top card of your draw pile for the rest of combat and play it immediately.

${modID}:EmergencyAssault.NAME: Emergency Assault
${modID}:EmergencyAssault.DESCRIPTION: Play the 3 top cards of your draw pile immediately.
${modID}:EmergencyAssault.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Upgrade the 3 top cards of your draw pile for the rest of combat and play them immediately.

${modID}:LeaveItToFate.NAME: Leave it to Fate
${modID}:LeaveItToFate.DESCRIPTION: Randomly increase or decrease the cost of each card in your hand by 1. NL !M! chances out of 10 to reduce the cost

${modID}:Avarice.NAME: Avarice
${modID}:Avarice.DESCRIPTION: Lose 1HP, Heal !M! HP, Gain 1 [E] , X times. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:Avarice.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Lose 1HP, Heal !M! HP, Gain 1 [E] , X times.

${modID}:HeroicDefend.NAME: Heroic Defend
${modID}:HeroicDefend.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL All Heroic Defend cards grant !M! more Block this combat.

${modID}:Frenzy.NAME: Frenzy
${modID}:Frenzy.DESCRIPTION: Rampage (3): Can be played. NL Gain [E]
${modID}:Frenzy.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Rampage (3): Can be played. NL Gain [E] [E]

${modID}:Backlash.NAME: Backlash
${modID}:Backlash.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Gain 1 Weak and 1 Vulnerable.

${modID}:Pilgrimage.NAME: Pilgrimage
${modID}:Pilgrimage.DESCRIPTION: Remove all Debuffs at the end of your next turn. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:WarTactics.NAME: War Tactics
${modID}:WarTactics.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Place a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.

${modID}:DoubleImpact.NAME: Double Impact
${modID}:DoubleImpact.DESCRIPTION: All Attacks you play this turn are played twice.

${modID}:Riptide.NAME: Riptide
${modID}:Riptide.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL ennemies !M! times.

${modID}:StrategicStrikes.NAME: Strategic Strikes
${modID}:StrategicStrikes.DESCRIPTION: Each time you play a card containing "Strike", Draw !M! card.
${modID}:StrategicStrikes.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Each time you play a card containing "Strike", Draw !M! cards.

${modID}:Replenishment.NAME: Replenishment
${modID}:Replenishment.DESCRIPTION: Draw 2 cards. NL One card containing "Defend" in your hand costs 0 until it is played.
${modID}:Replenishment.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw 2 cards. NL ALL cards containing "Defend" in your hand costs 0 until they are played.

${modID}:Hustle.NAME: Hustle
${modID}:Hustle.DESCRIPTION: Everyone takes 1 damage and Gains !M! temporary Strength .

${modID}:ExecutionStrike.NAME: Execution Strike
${modID}:ExecutionStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy is at !M! HP or below, deal !BD! damage instead.
${modID}:ExecutionStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy is at !M! HP or below, deal !BD! damage instead.

${modID}:FirstStrike.NAME: First Strike
${modID}:FirstStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy is not at full HP, also deal !SD! damage to yourself.
${modID}:FirstStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the enemy is not at full HP, also deal !SD! damage to yourself.

${modID}:ArmyOfSoldiers.NAME: Army of Soldiers
${modID}:ArmyOfSoldiers.DESCRIPTION: Add !M! random Soldier cards to your hand.

${modID}:CommandingPresence.NAME: Commanding Presence
${modID}:CommandingPresence.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, add !M! random Soldier card to your hand.
${modID}:CommandingPresence.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, add !M! random Soldier cards to your hand.

${modID}:Ambush.NAME: Ambush
${modID}:Ambush.DESCRIPTION: Gain 1 [E]. NL Upgrade a card in your hand for the rest of the combat. NL Gain 1 Temporary Dexterity.
${modID}:Ambush.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain 1 [E]. NL Upgrade a card in your hand for the rest of the combat. NL Gain 1 Dexterity.

${modID}:ClumsyStrike.NAME: Clumsy Strike
${modID}:ClumsyStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Lose 5 Strength at the end of the turn.

${modID}:MobileFortress.NAME: Mobile Fortress
${modID}:MobileFortress.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Plated Armor, Lose 4 Dexterity at the end of the turn.

${modID}:Catharsis.NAME: Catharsis
${modID}:Catharsis.DESCRIPTION: Reset the Strength and Dexterity modificators to 0.

${modID}:RejuvenatingBreath.NAME: Rejuvenating Breath
${modID}:RejuvenatingBreath.DESCRIPTION: This card costs the number of units of your HP. NL Heal !M! HP. Gain !B! Block. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:RejuvenatingBreath.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This card costs the number of units of your HP. NL Heal !M! HP. Gain !B! Block. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:BulwarkOfTheTitan.NAME: Bulwark of the Titan
${modID}:BulwarkOfTheTitan.DESCRIPTION: Gain Block equal to double your Strength.
${modID}:BulwarkOfTheTitan.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain Block equal to triple your Strength.

${modID}:Sacrament.NAME: Sacrament
${modID}:Sacrament.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Gold. Gain 5 more Gold whenever an enemy dies this combat
